title: Verify owner reconciliation decisions and corrections
preconditions: Ambiguous evidence, compatible and incompatible candidates, active deterministic and owner decisions, void and supersession cases, and explicit owner actor and reasons.
steps: Confirm one candidate, reject all, revoke and replace prior decisions, attempt invalid changes, void or supersede matched transactions, and inspect active links plus complete history after each operation.
expected: Only explicit valid intent changes the active link; prior decisions remain immutable and attributable; invalid requests fail closed; corrections or transaction lifecycle changes expose unresolved or exception states without silent evidence movement.
